hypothesis: On XAUUSD M5, the Asia session (00:00-06:00 UTC) builds a compressed range, and the London open (07:00-10:00 UTC) expands it. A true breakout with a displacement candle >= 1.2x ATR beyond the Asia range by >= 0.5x ATR produces positive expectancy when the range is neither too tight nor too wide (0.5-2.0x ATR).

regime_filter.description: Require Asia range/ATR14 in [0.5, 2.0] and ATR percentile above 30 to avoid dead tape.

entry_rules.long: During London window (07:00-10:00 UTC), close > Asia_high + 0.5*ATR14 AND candle body >= 1.2*ATR14. Only first breakout per day.
entry_rules.short: During London window, close < Asia_low - 0.5*ATR14 AND candle body >= 1.2*ATR14. Only first breakout per day.

exit_rules.stop_loss: opposite side of Asia range or 1.5x ATR14, whichever is closer
exit_rules.take_profit: 2.0x ATR14 (R:R ~1.3-1.5), with partial at 1.0x ATR and trail remainder by 1.0x ATR
exit_rules.time_stop: close at 16:00 UTC if neither SL/TP hit (max ~9h hold)
